examples: Conclusion: Compound was isolated from Astilbe for the first time.
Any of various chiefly eastern Asian perennial herbs of the genus Astilbe, having compound basal leaves and showy panicles of tiny colorful flowers.
Astilbe mainly contains coumarin, flavonoids, sterols and acidic component, with the effects of eliminating stasis to stop pain, dispelling wind to eliminate dampness, relieving cough by cooling etc.
